publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-06-17 18:38:28 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Division of Biological Sciences

did.abstract: Lectures in various topics related to biology and society, including the biology of man, man's diseases, agriculture, technology, economics, medicine, vision and perception, and computers.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Lectures in various topics related to biology and society, including the biology of man, man's diseases, agriculture, technology, economics, medicine, vision and perception, and computers.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Also, transcripts of taped lectures by Richard D. O'Brien on "Psychoactive Drugs," May 9, 1970; Robert S. Morison on "Experimentation on People," January 29, 1973; and Karen Arms on "Development of Sexuality," March 12, 1973.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Due to the fragility and potential degradation of moving image and sound recordings, viewing and listening is limited to items that have been digitized. If an item is in another media format, you may request to have the item digitized for access. Information on ordering access copies may be found on the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections webpage. Audio visual material that has been digitized: TR-2771, TR-2774, TR-2784, TR-2788, TR-2797, TR-2817, TR-2820, TR-2823, TR-2842, TR-2845, TR-2847, TR-2855, TR-2860

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University. Division of Biological Sciences. "Biology and Society" Lecture Series, #53-2-1312.
